content.en:
"With the assistance of the Firmament Wood Blade, I can refine my soul will faster!"

Ye Tian thought excitedly.

Immediately, he was ready to give it a try.

However, he had to find a place with the power of the Multidimensional Tribulation.

At this time, he thought of the Falling Wind Valley with the Wind Tribulation, where the Wind Tribulation power was okay.

So, he took the Firmament Blade to the Valley of the Storm.

Now, the Firmament Wooden Blade completely belongs to him, and he doesn't have to worry about being perceived by the Luo Qing Realm Lord when he takes it out.

Swish!

Ye Tian kept shuttling, and soon arrived at the Valley of the Falling Wind.

Entering the Valley of the Falling Wind again, Ye Tian found a place where the power of the Wind Tribulation was the most powerful, and then urged the Firmament Wooden Blade to transform the power of the Wind Tribulation.

Airplanes!

The power of the calamity was transformed, and wisps of calamity were absorbed by the Firmament Wooden Blade, and then merged into the soul will under Ye Tian's control, refining the soul will.

Pain!

The soul will was extremely painful, and subconsciously let Ye Tian control the power input of the wind calamity.

Subsequently, he adjusted the power of the storm and controlled it within the range of what he could bear.

"Sure enough, you can directly use the power of the wind to temper. "

Ye Tian was extremely excited.

This kind of refining effect is 25 times faster than before, and it is estimated that it will not be long before he can raise the will of the eighth dimension to the limit.

In this way, more than 500 extradimensional epochs have passed.

"The soul will has been raised to the limit of the eighth dimension, and there is only one step left before the ninth dimension!"

But Ye Tian knew very well that this step was still very far away, and it was definitely not easy to raise the soul will to the ninth dimension.

"The power of the tribulation is not effective, and it is necessary to change the power of a multi-dimensional tribulation, it is said that the power of a variety of multi-dimensional tribulations is used to temper the soul will, so that it is easier to break the shackles in the underworld. "

"And the soul needs to be more tenacious, and the power of the Wind Tribulation is not enough, and it also needs to absorb the power of other multi-dimensional tribulations. "

Soon.

Ye Tian left from the Falling Wind Valley and came to another place with the power of the multi-dimensional tribulation.

On this side of the more than 4,000 territories, there are many places where the power of the multidimensional tribulation remains.

For example, the Mountain of Fire Cliff has the power of fire robbery remaining.

In fact, the best place to cultivate was the Heavenly Spider Battlefield, but he didn't dare to go over it at the moment, and he was ready to wait a few more years before he entered the Heavenly Spider Battlefield.

After all, he hadn't found the third layer of the Sanwu Secret Method in the Heavenly Spider Battlefield, and that was his purpose.

Rumble!!!!!

The power of the fire robbery swept in, and Ye Tian took the opportunity to urge the Firmament Wood Blade to absorb the power of the fire robbery, and adjust the power of the fire robbery for refining.

This time the tempering was still very painful, but the effect was much better than that of the wind calamity.

After all, he has been refining with the Tribulation Wind for a long time, and he has developed resistance, and now that he has used the Tribulation Fire Quenching for the first time, the effect will naturally be very good.

In this way, Ye Tian's soul will has been under the tempering of the calamity, making the soul more tenacious, and the soul will becoming stronger and stronger, but it is still at the limit of the eighth dimension.

In terms of total amount, his soul will has not increased, but the quality has improved, making the soul will continue to compress and condense and become more tenacious.

At this rate, he is indeed expected to impact the ninth dimension.

In this way, more than 600 extradimensional epochs have passed.

At this time, Ye Tian felt that the effect of the fire robbery was not very good, so he looked for the location that contained the power of the thunder.

this day.

Ye Tian came to the Thunder Breaking Abyss, where the power of thunder robbery remains, and it is also a famous forbidden area.

After he came to the Thunder Breaking Abyss, he found a suitable place to cultivate, where he used the power of the thunder to temper his soul will.

This time, the pain is far greater than before, because the effect of the thunderstorm on the soul refining is greater, as if it is more suitable for refining the soul, but the pain is also greater.

Thundered!!!!

The thunderstorm continued to be refined, and his soul will seemed to be about to undergo some kind of transformation, but it was still one step behind.

So, he continued to refine until he had more than five hundred extradimensional epochs, and then stopped.

Ye Tian was ready to find the power of robbing light.

The power of the multi-dimensional tribulation is multi-dimensional tribulation of thunder, wind, and fire, and the tribulation of light is relatively rare, but before the nine multi-dimensional tribulations, there was a tribulation of light as the power of the multi-dimensional tribulation.

After Ye Tian's investigation, he learned that in an area of the 4233rd Territory, there was a place in the third dimension that contained the power of robbing light, which belonged to small fragments of the battlefield, and there were no good things, all of them were explored, and only the power of robbing light remained.

So, Ye Tian immediately rushed there.

Then, he tore through the multidimensional barrier and escaped into the third dimension, where he found the small fragment.

Here, he really saw the power of the light.

This light was white, but it contained terrifying erosion, but with the help of the Firmament Blade, he managed to absorb the power of the light and transform it into a more gentle light to temper his soul will.

Time passed slowly, and Ye Tian had sensed that the bottleneck of his soul will was gradually broken under the action of the power of the light robbery.

More than 300 extradimensional epochs have passed.

this day.

Rumble!!!!!

Ye Tian's soul will finally completed the transformation, transforming from the eighth dimension to the ninth dimension.

This time of transformation, the soul will has been wildly improved, both in terms of quality and 910 quantity, far exceeding before.

It took a long time for this transformation to complete.

Subsequently, Ye Tian used the Thousand Dimensions Technique to test it, and his soul will had indeed entered the ninth dimension.

"Very good, the soul will has reached the ninth dimension, if I can create the will of the ninth dimension, then my combat power can definitely reach the sixth day level combat power. "

Ye Tian muttered.

Subsequently.

He tried with all his might to create his own ninth-dimensional will mastery, and he was ready to combine several multi-dimensional tribulation powers, combined with the ninth-dimensional soul will, to create a suitable ninth-dimensional will mastery.

At the same time, he finally sent another replica body into the Celestial Spider Battlefield to find the inheritance of the third layer of the Three Black Secret Method.

In this way, one extradimensional epoch after another passed.

Ye Tian sacrificed a replica body, explored a large number of territories of the Heavenly Spider Battlefield, and finally found the bones of a fourth realm extradimensional realm in one place.

And according to his detection, this Fourth Realm is one of the targets he is looking for.

It's a pity that this Fourth Realm does not have the third-layer inheritance of the Three Black Secret Method.

Helpless, he could only continue to search.

Hundreds of extradimensional epochs had passed, and he had once again found the Fourth Realm Skeleton, one of his targets.

This time, his luck was good.
